name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. "I want eta to..." is less useful than "Right now, I have to manually X because eta doesn't Y." -->

## Describe the solution you'd like

<!-- What should eta do differently? Be as specific as you can. -->

## Have you considered any alternatives?

<!-- Any other approaches you've thought about, or workarounds you're currently using? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else that would help — screenshots, links, examples from other tools, etc. -->
